name: Xot
purpose: Fornire il foundation layer condiviso del monolite modulare: base models, actions, migration helpers, resource base e governance tecnica.
goals: Fornire primitive comuni per tutto il repo
nonGoals: Assorbire logica specifica dei moduli di dominio
sourceFramework: Notion product template family adapted to repository governance
architectureRule: No generic Services for business logic; use Action classes with execute()
